title: SoundHound AI Reports Record Q1 Revenue of $44.2 Million, Up 52%
text: SoundHound AI announced record first-quarter 2026 results with revenue reaching $44.2 million, representing 52% year-over-year growth. The company achieved a GAAP gross margin of 31.1%, down from 36.5% year-over-year due to acquisition-related impacts and temporary vendor costs. Core automotive and IoT AI revenue grew 88% organically, demonstrating strong demand in the company's largest market segments. The company launched OASYS, an orchestrated agentic AI platform, and announced a definitive agreement to acquire LivePerson. At quarter-end, SoundHound maintained a strong balance sheet with $216 million in cash and equivalents, zero debt, and a current ratio of 5.15. The company reaffirmed its 2026 revenue guidance of $225-260 million and provided 2027 guidance of $350-400 million including LivePerson. The company continues to expand partnerships across automotive, restaurants, financial services, healthcare, and retail sectors.
